title: Middle Eastern Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful Moroccan dish with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and a rich sauce. Perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.

ingredients.name: Eastern spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb in batches, about 5 minutes per batch.
Remove the lamb and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the garlic, cooking until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the eastern spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tagine sauce and bring to a boil.
Return the lamb to the pot, cover, and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the dried fruits and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, drizzled with gooey honey.
